titleStmt.title: SII 37.21: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 21. (A.R. No. 346 of 1938-39.) Chintalapaṭṭūru, (hamlet of Koṭlūru) Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: The basement of the Indranāthēśvara temple.
The is dated Śaka 1225, Śōbhakṛit, Śrāvaṇa śu. 10, Friday, corresponding to 1302 A.D. August 4, Saturday.
It records the sale of land by Dēvajiyya, one of the sthānapatis of the Indrēśvaradēva temple and son of Annāmalajiyya to his cousins Bhairajiyya and Mallājiyya for a sum of 320 Varahas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1225 Agunēṁṭi śōbhakritu saṁvvatsara śrāvaṇasudda 10 śu krivārāna svasti . śrīmatu Iṁdrēśvara dēvara sdhānapatulalōna Aṁnnamala jiyyala koḍku dēvajiyyala cētaṁnu Inuṁgalūri prōlajiyyala koḍuku mallajiyyālānu bhairavajiyyānu koṁnna vrittadēvajiyyalaku celli Iṁdrēśvara dēvarakunū sōmanādha dēvarakūnū cellēvrittulaṁdūnu vrittūḍlula kekkabaḍina nūtu
cēni Aṁdunū maḍlaṁdūnu peṁḍḍikā dravyamu naṁdūnū sa¨rvvamanaṁdūnū tana tātala taṁḍri taramuna cēllēvritti Enava pālilōnu sakamu vrittiki mūllyeṁmu varahāvipaṇamulu muṁnūṁṭa Iruvaipaṇamulūnuṁ 320 koni tanajñātula Anumatāna dhārāpū¨rvvakamusēsi mallajiyyalakūnu bhairajiyyalakūnu Iccenu . Iṁttanuṁḍi biḍḍabiḍḍa taramu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāyigānu
viṁppaṁgala dīnkisākṣidha¨rmasivācā¨ryyatānu tripurāṁtta guruvū maṭhastānapatulūnu brāhmālūnu puṣpagiri prabhuvulu mukhyamaina cātu¨rvva¨rnamula vārunu vīri Ubhayāna tāna vrāsina karaṇaṁ bācirāju . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
